# Red Maple Handyman Services

> 5-star handyman services for homeowners in Barrie, Innisfil and Simcoe County — repairs, painting, carpentry, plumbing, electrical, flooring, exterior projects and more.

Red Maple Handyman Services is a local, family-run team offering finish-quality home repairs and improvements with free estimates and a satisfaction guarantee. Service area includes Barrie, Innisfil, Orillia, Midland, Collingwood, Wasaga Beach, Alliston, Orangeville, Bradford, Newmarket, Aurora, Muskoka, Bracebridge, Gravenhurst and York.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Services, recent work, service area, and how to request a free estimate.
- [Simcoe County Renovation Grants Guide](/resources/grants-guide): Ontario and Simcoe County home improvement grants, rebates and tax credits for 2025–2026.
